column2: Remote Pilot Fails to Request Review of Conduct and CAA Decision Stands
column3: ["The remote pilot does not express dissatisfaction about the RAE's competency assessment. ", 'The remote pilot fails to request a review of conduct of test or exam. ', 'The CAA makes its decision based on available information. ']
column4: ["No record or evidence of the remote pilot raising concerns about the RAE's competency assessment. ", 'No request for review is submitted by the remote pilot. ', "The CAA's decision stands, as there are no records or evidence of a review being requested. "]
